pages.text: Rubedo is the embryo, not the conclusion. Calcine it in a furnace to obtain the $(item)Philosopher's Stone$()—the supreme achievement of Chaos Alchemy.

pages.title: Calcination
pages.text: $(quote)This is complete; I testify to it by the judgment of the world.$()

pages.name: Healing Corruption
pages.text: Right-click a zombie villager while holding the stone to complete its conversion immediately, without weakness or a golden apple.

pages.title: Life Protection
pages.text: Holding the stone in either hand continuously grants regeneration and a brief saturation effect each second. If an off-cooldown stone is in the hotbar when you suffer fatal damage, death is canceled, health becomes 1, and that stone enters a 60-second cooldown.

pages.title: Polarity Adjustment
pages.text: Right-click a crucible while holding the Philosopher's Stone to move any nonzero polarity one point toward 0. It is slow, but exact and safe.

pages.title: Chaos Decomposition
pages.text: Use the stone as a crucible catalyst, then insert any item that a Sigil Scroll can replicate. The item is reverse-decomposed into a random quantity of base essence metals—an effective source for large reserves.

pages.title: The Work Is Complete
pages.text: You began with three powders in a cauldron and learned to read the hidden relations of twelve metals. With the stone in hand, decomposition, transformation, life, and balance have become parts of one art.$(br2)$(quote)What I have said of the operation of the Sun is complete.$()
